content_blocks.text: Great data! Now let me also search for a few more YC-connected alumni I spotted in the results (like Pina Earth YC W22, Taktile YC S20, askLio YC S23, Langdock YC S23) to fill in any gaps:

I have all the data I need. Let me now compile the full picture across all confirmed YC alumni and their current companies/roles.

Here is the final visualization JSON:

{
  "analysis": "17 CDTM alumni have direct YC connections, spanning batches from S11 (2011) to W25 (2025). The vast majority (14 of 17) are still actively running or working at their YC-backed startups, spanning AI, SaaS, climate tech, and supply chain. Only a handful have moved on — one became a serial founder at a new venture, and one exited to join another YC company. The most represented batches are W24, S24, and W25, reflecting a strong recent surge of CDTM founders going through YC.",

final_graph.analysis: 17 CDTM alumni have direct YC connections, spanning batches from S11 (2011) to W25 (2025). The vast majority (14 of 17) are still actively running or working at their YC-backed startups, spanning AI, SaaS, climate tech, and supply chain. Only a handful have moved on — one became a serial founder at a new venture, and one exited to join another YC company. The most represented batches are W24, S24, and W25, reflecting a strong recent surge of CDTM founders going through YC.
final_graph.title: CDTM Alumni Who Went Through Y Combinator
